rationale: Gov't Code §2054.252 governs the state electronic Internet portal project for licensing entities. It has no relation to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The department shall implement a state electronic Internet portal project that establishes a common electronic infrastructure through which state agencies and local governments, including licensing entities, may by any method:
_note: No conflict; rule_text concerns electronic portal infrastructure, not property tax exemptions.
